arts.ttl: Galatasaray & Fenerbahce Shine in Europa League, Besiktas Disappoint
arts.sum: Galatasaray kicked off their UEFA Europa League campaign with a 3-1 win over PAOK. The Turkish side dominated the match, with goals from Abdul Rahman Baba (own goal), Yunus Akgun, and Mauro Icardi securing the victory. Galatasaray’s forward duo of Osimhen and Akgun played key roles in the win. Their performances were crucial in securing […]

arts.ttl: Preview: Galatasaray vs. Kasimpasa - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Turkish Super Lig clash between Galatasaray and Kasimpasa, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
